faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Fresh Meadows typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Fresh Meadows apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Fresh Meadows apartments take 4-6 hours for the initial service. Heat treatments can often be completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination of newly hatched bed bugs.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Fresh Meadows home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise the temperature to lethal levels. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying out for 4-6 hours after application. We'll provide specific instructions based on your chosen treatment method and living situation.

faqs.question: Are bed bugs common in Fresh Meadows apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, bed bugs are found throughout Fresh Meadows in both older garden apartments and newer buildings. They spread easily through shared walls and common areas. Early detection and professional treatment are essential to prevent infestations from spreading to neighboring units in multi-family buildings.
